text:
Mr. Ral is the father of Petra Ral.

Appearance

Mr. Ral has short, shaggy light hair and slightly wrinkled skin. He appears to be an aged man, around his late forties to early fifties.

Story

After realizing his daughter Petra ventured into a forest with her friends to catch insects, Mr. Ral appears with a rope and demands to know what she is doing amongst mixed company. Hange Zoë apologizes and tells him she was the one that had offered them to join her; Mr. Ral angrily denounces her reason and continues to lecture Petra. Afterwards, the group follow Mr. Ral's rope out of the forest.
